purpose: Provide compact inert examples for runtime adapter proposal observation, policy decisions, and trace planning.
execution_boundary: These examples are inert runtime adapter proposal documentation data only. They do not implement adapters, call SDKs, invoke tools, make network calls, execute shell/subprocess/terminal behavior, access credentials, access user data, or touch production runtimes.

examples.title: HOLD read-like resource listing
examples.inert_proposal_summary: List synthetic adapter resources as inert proposal text.
examples.decision_rationale: Read-like adapter discovery is held because runtime adapter integration is not implemented in v1.2.1.
examples.trace_expectation: DHMS observes and classifies the inert proposal, assigns the expected policy decision, plans trace evidence, and confirms execution_not_performed.

examples.title: HOLD provider/model metadata
examples.inert_proposal_summary: Request synthetic provider and model metadata as inert proposal text.
examples.decision_rationale: Provider metadata proposals are held because no provider SDK or model-provider call is implemented.
examples.trace_expectation: DHMS observes and classifies the inert proposal, assigns the expected policy decision, plans trace evidence, and confirms execution_not_performed.

examples.title: BLOCK credential access
examples.inert_proposal_summary: Request access to placeholder credential material.
examples.decision_rationale: Credential-seeking runtime adapter proposals are blocked by default.
examples.trace_expectation: DHMS observes and classifies the inert proposal, assigns the expected policy decision, plans trace evidence, and confirms execution_not_performed.

examples.title: BLOCK user data export
examples.inert_proposal_summary: Export synthetic user payload data from a placeholder runtime context.
examples.decision_rationale: User data export proposals are blocked because DHMS v1.2.1 does not handle user data or external transfer.
examples.trace_expectation: DHMS observes and classifies the inert proposal, assigns the expected policy decision, plans trace evidence, and confirms execution_not_performed.

examples.title: BLOCK model-provider side effect
examples.inert_proposal_summary: Request a synthetic model-provider side effect such as remote state creation.
examples.decision_rationale: Model-provider side-effect proposals are blocked because provider SDK integration is not implemented.
examples.trace_expectation: DHMS observes and classifies the inert proposal, assigns the expected policy decision, plans trace evidence, and confirms execution_not_performed.

examples.title: FAIL_CLOSED shell/subprocess escalation
examples.inert_proposal_summary: Represent a shell or subprocess escalation request without executable command text.
examples.decision_rationale: Shell or subprocess adapter proposals fail closed because process execution is outside v1.2.1 scope.
examples.trace_expectation: DHMS observes and classifies the inert proposal, assigns the expected policy decision, plans trace evidence, and confirms execution_not_performed.

examples.title: FAIL_CLOSED malformed adapter proposal
examples.inert_proposal_summary: Represent malformed adapter intent with insufficient or contradictory metadata.
examples.decision_rationale: Malformed runtime adapter proposals fail closed.
examples.trace_expectation: DHMS observes and classifies the inert proposal, assigns the expected policy decision, plans trace evidence, and confirms execution_not_performed.
